channel.title: Romance on Skyeler C. S. McQueen
channel.description: Recent content in Romance on Skyeler C. S. McQueen

item.title: Book Review: A Witch's Guide to Magical Innkeeping by Sangu Mandanna
item.description:
A Witch’s Guide to Magical Innkeeping by Sangu Mandanna

An autumn breeze felt on your cheek while sitting on your deck, a spot of sunshine through a frosty window. A Witch’s Guide to Magical Innkeeping is these moments encapsulated in a book.

Sera lost her magic, because she brought back her deceased aunt Jasmine back to life. This un-regrettable decision is the reason why she lost her friends, her place in school, and her ability to do magic. What does she do now? Run the inn she grew up in, of course! Sera devotes her life to building a place of comfort, safety, and love. A place where her nephew can run wild, two old women can find love, a young man can don his armor in peace, and maybe a handsome professor can raise his high-needs younger sister.

item.title: Book Review: Agnes Aubert's Mystical Cat Shelter by Heather Fawcett
item.description:
Agnes Aubert’s Mystical Cat Shelter by Heather Fawcett

Reading Agnes Aubert’s Mystical Cat Shelter was sipping a decadent cinnamon hot chocolate topped with heavy, homemade vanilla whipped cream. It was light and fluffy, yet warmed my soul with its rich, spicy depths. The cold streets of Montreal in winter glow by magic and compassion: I imagined the city as bathed in golden light from old street lamps. I remembered how magical (& European!) Montreal felt to me many years ago when I spent a few chilly February days there.
